description.p: Recall is a memory game built with Rust, GTK4, and libadwaita that starts calm and grows into a sharp challenge. Classic, Trio, and Infinite modes begin readable and become more demanding at higher difficulties.

screenshot.caption: Build groups of three in Trio mode
Learn the rules with the in-app guide
Celebrate a flawless Harmony S victory
Start a new run from the main menu

description.p: Recall 1.0.0 refines the game feel, improves the GNOME-native interface, and hardens local data handling for a more polished release.

ul.li: Added a proper preferences flow and an in-app how-to experience with dedicated slides
Refined the local score dialog with a more native libadwaita layout and better empty states
Polished board feedback, match dimming, and victory transitions for smoother visual flow
Rebalanced previews and penalties, especially in Trio and higher difficulties
Improved the onboarding flow with clearer progression across modes and difficulty cues
Hardened local records and continue-run data loading against corrupted or partial files
Expanded UI copy coverage and cleaned up remaining i18n and runtime presentation issues
